one_time_description: Legal fees of $418,206 recorded in the year (split between Governance and Economic Development segments), not present in prior year
economic_notes: Nation operates White River Development Corporation (100% owned) and Copper Niisuu Limited Partnership (99% owned), both accounted for by modified equity method. Kaminak Gold Corporation provided $30,000 in funding (down from $618,760 prior year).
notes: Nation is located in Yukon Territory (YT). Two GBEs accounted for by modified equity method: White River Development Corporation and Copper Niisuu Limited Partnership. No long-term debt on balance sheet. No schedule of remuneration for chief/council/staff included in the financial statements. Budget information was not prepared for the full scope of activities. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($3,828,159) + Health Canada ($12,362) + Heritage Canada ($405,149) + Yukon Government ($620,169) + Council of Yukon First Nations ($318,193) + National Indian Brotherhood ($0) + Yukon Housing Corporation ($0) = $5,183,832. OSR includes investment income, other revenue, admin fees, rental income, repayment of funding (negative), and equity income. Legal fees of $418,206 are unusual and not present in prior year. Auditor firm name not explicitly stated beyond 'Chartered Professional Accountants' with Nanaimo BC address.
